description: Browse, deploy, and generate Protagon AI character identities.
author: Protagons

tools.name: protagons_list
tools.description: List available Protagons from the public library. Returns name, slug, tagline, and category for each.

tools.name: protagons_get
tools.description: Fetch a single Protagon by slug. Returns the full .protagon.json with all dimensions, personality, and synthesized prompt.

tools.name: protagons_deploy
tools.description: Deploy a Protagon to the workspace as a SOUL.md personality file. Optionally includes voice configuration.

tools.name: protagons_status
tools.description: Check the current deployment status — whether a SOUL.md exists and which Protagon is active.

tools.name: protagons_generate
tools.description: Generate a new Protagon from a description using the Protagons API. Requires a Google API key.
